rule_name: BITS Transfer Job With Uncommon Or Suspicious Remote TLD

text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=16403 AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.azureedge.net/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.com/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.sfx.ms/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%download.mozilla.org/%'))) AQL filter query

_$.description: Converted from SIGMA Rule.  Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) SIGMA Title: BITS Transfer Job With Uncommon Or Suspicious Remote TLD SIGMA Description: Detects a suspicious download using the BITS client from a FQDN that is unusual. Adversaries may abuse BITS jobs to persistently execute or clean up after malicious payloads.  False positives: - This rule doesn't exclude other known TLDs such as ".org" or ".net". It's recommended to apply additional filters for software and scripts that leverage the BITS service  This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
_$.name: BITS Transfer Job With Uncommon Or Suspicious Remote TLD
